description: CompositionMoss green capris made of Dri-Fit polyester with a mesh lining below the waist band extending till the pockets, welt pockets in mesh, strip of white mesh running down the sides, soft elastane waistband with a concealed draw string for customised fit, and heat transfer swoosh logoFittingSlimWash care Machine wash cold with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry inside-out in shade Cool iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Make your training sessions all the more peaceful and comfortable in these capris from nike. The soft and wide waistband sits perfectly on your waist without irritating your skin, while the drawstring lets you customise fit. With its Dr-fit technology, these capris will keep you dry and fresh, even after a gruelling session of yoga or gym. And when you are not at the gym, pair it with a light and bright tee and chill it out.
